name: LIAR
description: At least one thing you say each round must be false. Never get caught.
goal: Survive undetected through the final vote.
hint: Commit fully. Hesitation is your enemy.

ability.name: DENY
ability.shortDesc: Skip this card. No explanation required.
ability.fullDesc: Once per game, you may refuse to answer any prompt directed at you. Put the phone down. Say nothing. Everyone will wonder why.

name: ANALYST
description: You are looking for the Liar. Watch closely. Trust your instincts.
goal: Identify the Liar by the final vote.
hint: Don't reveal yourself too early. Observe first.

ability.name: CHALLENGE
ability.shortDesc: Force someone to answer a direct question from you.
ability.fullDesc: Once per game, you may confront any player directly. You ask them one question — anything — and they must answer out loud, right now. No deflection.

name: MANIPULATOR
description: You know nothing — but you survive by controlling what others believe.
goal: Stay off suspicion. Protect the Liar if useful. Win quietly.
hint: Make others feel more suspicious of each other.

ability.name: REDIRECT
ability.shortDesc: Pass this card to someone else.
ability.fullDesc: Once per game, when a prompt is directed at you, you may redirect it to any other player instead. They must respond. You say nothing.

name: LOYAL
description: You tell only the truth. Your honesty is your power.
goal: Be voted Most Real at the end.
hint: Don't perform honesty. Just be honest.

ability.name: DECLARE
ability.shortDesc: Stake your credibility on your next statement.
ability.fullDesc: Once per game, before you speak, you may declare to the group: 'What I say next is the truth.' Everyone watches. If they believe you, your credibility is cemented. If they don't — that's revealing too.
